schemaStatus.conclusion: Schema has releaseDate field with full source/confidence metadata — but the field is never populated by syncRealRevenue(). Always NULL in production DB.

syncStatus.repairAction: Add releaseDate population on upsert (from TWSE publish date or INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH rule)

pitGateStatus.gateNote: PIT gate exists and is applied in RuleBasedStockAnalyzer.ts. Infers releaseDate as next-month 10th when NULL. Confidence: LOW_TO_MEDIUM — not explicitly set by sync.

reasons: releaseDate field exists in schema but syncRealRevenue() never populates it
All records have releaseDate = NULL in production DB

notes: year + month int pair uniquely identifies revenue period
Normalization adequate for PIT gate — blocked only by releaseDate NULL issue

dryRunReadiness: BLOCKED — syncRealRevenue() must populate releaseDate before dry-run gate activation
activationRequirements: 1. Repair syncRealRevenue(): populate releaseDate on each upsert (from TWSE API or INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH)
2. Set releaseDateSource='EXPLICIT' or 'INFERRED' and releaseDateConfidence accordingly
3. Run migration to backfill historical releaseDate using INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH rule
5. Hard constraint: entersAlphaScore = false — dry-run readiness does not imply alphaScore eligibility

hardConstraints.entersAlphaScoreReason: MonthlyRevenue is not in ALPHA_SCORE_PERMITTED_SOURCES (p29i). Must remain STRUCTURAL_PLACEHOLDER_ONLY or at most source-present dry-run.
hardConstraints.financialReportStatus: HIGH_RISK_SOURCE_ABSENT — must not enter this activation path
hardConstraints.newsEventStatus: HIGH_RISK_SOURCE_ABSENT — must not enter this activation path

disclaimer: Structural audit-only. Does not constitute investment advice. No financial claims, win-rate, edge, or outperformance claims. Results must not be used as buy/sell/hold signals.
